summary: Iteration 22 Backend Testing Complete - Shop checkout email notification feature verified. All 9 tests passed. The payment-verify endpoint correctly includes email_sent field and sends email confirmations to customers when Resend API is configured and domain is verified.
critical_code_review_comments: Note: Resend API is in sandbox mode - emails only sent to admin email (asrenterprisespatna@gmail.com). For production, verify domain at resend.com/domains
seed_data_creation: Created several test orders with TEST_ prefix for payment verification testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 22 tested the new email notification feature for shop orders. Key findings: 1) POST /api/shop/orders creates orders with customer_email stored correctly. 2) POST /api/shop/orders/{order_id}/payment-verify endpoint includes email_sent field (boolean) in response. 3) email_sent=True when email successfully sent via Resend API. 4) email_sent=False when no customer email provided OR when Resend API rejects (sandbox mode limitation). 5) WhatsApp notification URLs returned correctly in both order creation and payment verify responses. 6) Order status changes to 'confirmed' and payment_status to 'paid' after successful payment verification. 7) The email template for shop orders includes an order items table with product names, quantities, and prices. 8) Resend API is configured with sandbox key - can only send to admin email in test environment.

backend_apis.POST /api/shop/orders (without email): PASSED - Order created with empty email

email_notification.reason_for_test_email_failure: Resend API sandbox mode - only admin email allowed

whatsapp_notifications.customer_notification_url: Present with customer phone and country code 91
